meaning: n.狭长的景色,街景,展望,回想
examples: You turn a corner and see a vista, and your imagination bolts away.
From my bedroom window I looked out on a crowded vista of hills and rooftops.
The Sun Vista went down in international waters.
The summit greets us with a vista arranged from snow and ice, water and clouds.
The outside, with its woody shell and velvety green coating, admittedly offers the more attractive vista.
